hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(tailwind\.config\.js|global\.css|src/constants/palettes\.ts)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just edited a theming file (palettes.ts, global.css, or tailwind.config.js). Run /sync-colors now to verify all three layers stay in sync."}}' || true
